tried_strategies.goal: Fix Korean 2-char extraction + alphanumeric tokens + FTS5 OR semantics

known_facts: FTS5 with porter unicode61 tokenizer does not stem Korean (Hangul AC00-D7A3)
Korean syllables tokenized individually by unicode61, multi-syllable words not indexed as phrases
English keywords in Korean prompts work fine (BM25, threshold, recall etc)
chat-memory.py currently uses FTS5 MATCH with AND semantics for multi-token queries
vault.db has 143K messages across 545 sessions, CTX project has 14 sessions
extract_keywords() already strips Korean stopwords but regex [a-zA-Z가-힣]{3,} does match Korean syllable clusters
